form.formComment: Suited by inside box. Last start finished 6th in a Rank Limit - Grade 5 on April 2 over 460m at this track behind Miss Black beaten 7 lengths (26.97). Looks well placed and should prove hard to beat.

form.formComment: Placed last time (23.26) at this track in a Rank Limit - Grade 5, finishing third and beaten 3.5 lengths. Fairly consistent record from the draw including a win and three minors. Looks a key chance on best form.

form.formComment: Ended last campaign with a fifth (23.64) in a GR 5 at this track and returns after a three-and-a-half months break. Yet to win fresh but has been in the money two times. Tough field and looking to others this time.
